name: Clinica Sorriso Feliz - WhatsApp AI Agent

nodes.name: IF - Ignore Bot or Empty Message

parameters.jsCode:
const conversation = $json.conversation;
return [{ json: { ...$json, conversation_id: conversation.id, conversation_status: conversation.status, conversation_intent: conversation.intent } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  conversation_id: $json.conversation_id,
  evolution_message_id: $json.evolution_message_id,
  sender: 'patient',
  direction: 'inbound',
  body: $json.message_text || null,
  media_url: $json.media_url,
  media_mime_type: $json.media_mime_type,
  message_type: $json.message_type,
  intent: $json.intent,
  intent_confidence: $json.intent_confidence,
  sent_at: $json.sent_at,
  metadata: {
    n8n_execution_id: $json.n8n_execution_id,
    raw_event: $json.raw_event,
    gemini_classification: $json.classification
  }
} }}

parameters.jsCode:
const current = $('Parse Intent Classification').first().json;
return [{ json: current }];

const current = $('Restore Context After Insert').first().json;
return [{ json: current }];

const reason = $json.handoff_reason ? ` Motivo: ${$json.handoff_reason}` : '';
return [{ json: { ...$json, ai_response_text: `Obrigado pela mensagem. Vou encaminhar sua conversa para a equipe da Clinica Sorriso Feliz continuar o atendimento com cuidado.${reason}` } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  conversation_id: $json.conversation_id,
  sender: $json.needs_human ? 'system' : 'agent',
  direction: 'outbound',
  body: $json.ai_response_text,
  message_type: 'text',
  ai_model: $json.needs_human ? null : 'gemini-2.5-flash',
  ai_prompt_tokens: $json.needs_human ? null : $json.gemini_prompt_tokens,
  ai_completion_tokens: $json.needs_human ? null : $json.gemini_completion_tokens,
  ai_total_tokens: $json.needs_human ? null : $json.gemini_total_tokens,
  intent: $json.intent,
  intent_confidence: $json.intent_confidence,
  sent_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  metadata: {
    n8n_execution_id: $json.n8n_execution_id,
    needs_human: $json.needs_human,
    handoff_reason: $json.handoff_reason,
    gemini_response: $json.gemini_response_raw ?? null
  }
} }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, ignored: false, conversation_id: $('Prepare Delivery Update').first().json.conversation_id, intent: $('Prepare Delivery Update').first().json.intent, needs_human: $('Prepare Delivery Update').first().json.needs_human, status: $('Prepare Delivery Update').first().json.needs_human ? 'aguardando_humano' : 'em_andamento' } }}
={{ { ok: false, workflow: 'Clinica Sorriso Feliz - WhatsApp AI Agent', error: $json.message ?? $json.error?.message ?? 'Unhandled workflow error', execution_id: $execution.id } }}

main.node: IF - Ignore Bot or Empty Message
